prompt:
My horizontal layout breaks when users set accessibility text sizes. The HStack overflows and clips:

```swift
HStack {
    Image(systemName: "person.fill")
    Text(user.name).font(.headline)
    Spacer()
    Text(user.role).font(.subheadline)
}
```

assertions.text: Uses ViewThatFits or AnyLayout to switch HStack to VStack
Uses @ScaledMetric for the image/icon size so it scales with Dynamic Type
assertions.rationale: Skill rule 14: non-text dimensions must use @ScaledMetric

assertions.text: Wraps content in ScrollView for overflow at large sizes
assertions.rationale: Skill rule 14: wrap in ScrollView for overflow
